GrindStreaks: <font color='#FFFFFF'>Lightning icons</font> on TAB show consecutive login days. <font color='#FF0000'>Longer streaks make the icon more intense and red.</font>
LotteryCmd: Type <font color='#FFFFFF'>.lottery</font> to customize your experience and learn more about the lottery.
Discord: Join our Discord for surveys and updates: https://discord.hsmania.net
Store: Type <font color='#FFFFFF'>.sklepsms</font> or visit <font color='#A020F0'>https://hsownia.sklepcs.pl</font> to buy items.
JoinVol: Support our growth and apply to be a <font color='#00FF00'>volunteer</font> at <font color='#A020F0'>https://join.hsmania.net</font>
VIP_Pricing: <font color='#008000'>VIP access</font> is available for <font color='#00FF00'>~0.47 €</font>.
Reservation_Pricing: <font color='#008000'>Priority access</font> is available for <font color='#00FF00'>~0.24 €</font>.
